channel.title: AI 每日先锋
channel.description: 每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。
channel.itunes:author: AI 先锋

item.title: AI 新闻快报 | 2026-06-08
item.description:
每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。

  1. 🟡 5分钟AI长视频不翻车！国产开源框架杀到全球第一梯队 (量子位)
  2. 🟡 马斯克39页SpaceX计划，人类史上最伟大的PPT (量子位)
  3. 🟡 Amazing Digital Dentures (a failed project) (HuggingFace Blog)
  4. 🟡 有余凯不投的地平线离职创业员工吗？ (量子位)
  5. 🟡 OpenAI芯片核心叛逃Anthropic！就在量产前夜 (量子位)
  6. 🟡 教你用AI一节课收17万，华尔街精英排着队付费 (量子位)

item.title: AI 新闻快报 | 2026-06-07
item.description:
每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。

  1. 🟡 今年CVPR看点是广东：何恺明再获至高大奖，广工大打破大厂名校垄断 (量子位)
  2. 🟡 I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  3. 🟡 Five labs, five minds: building a multi-model finance drama on small models (HuggingFace Blog)
  4. 🟡 大模型发展三年半，AI圈终于等来了一场“不要大厂，只赌脑洞”的比赛 (量子位)
  5. 🟡 港股鞋王千百度，一夜完成AI数据公司转型 (量子位)
  6. 🟡 Hinton吹哨了：AI已经有意识！ (量子位)
  7. 🟡 马斯克是SpaceX面子，她才是里子 (量子位)

item.title: AI 新闻快报 | 2026-06-06
item.description:
每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。

  1. 🔴 The latest AI news we announced in May 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  2. 🔴 Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments (Google AI Blog)
  3. 🔴 100 things we announced at I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  4. 🔴 New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace (Google AI Blog)
  5. 🔴 I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era (Google AI Blog)
  6. 🔴 Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action (Google AI Blog)
  7. 🔴 A new era for AI Search (Google AI Blog)
  8. 🔴 Everything new in our Google AI subscriptions, fresh from I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  9. 🟡 华为云发布Agentic AI系列新品 打造智能时代“硅基黑土地” (量子位)
  10. 🟡 从超级个体到超级团队，腾讯云发布WorkBuddy企业版 (量子位)
  11. 🟡 B站宣布启动AI创造公开赛 打造中国版Build in Public (量子位)
  12. 🟡 100亿砸向人形，不如先让10万台机器狗走进家庭 (量子位)
  13. 🟡 活久见！奥特曼Dario哈萨比斯同仇敌忾：DNA得查了 (量子位)
  14. 🟡 全球首个机器人训练楼盘开盘：30万套中国住宅，机器人拎包入住 (量子位)
  15. 🟡 How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  16. 🟡 Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026. (Google AI Blog)
  17. 🟡 How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S. (Google AI Blog)
  18. 🟡 Thousand Token Wood: shipping a multi-agent economy on a 3B model (HuggingFace Blog)
  19. 🟡 Holo3.1: Fast & Local Computer Use Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  20. 🟡 Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains (HuggingFace Blog)
  21. 🟡 Beyond LLMs: Why Scalable Enterprise AI Adoption Depends on Agent Logic (HuggingFace Blog)
  22. 🟡 Reachy Mini goes fully local (HuggingFace Blog)
  23. 🟡 Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family (HuggingFace Blog)
  24. 🟡 PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend (HuggingFace Blog)
  25. 🟡 Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching (HuggingFace Blog)
  26. 🟡 vLLM V0 to V1: Correctness Before Corrections in RL (HuggingFace Blog)
  27. 🟡 Granite 4.1 LLMs: How They’re Built (HuggingFace Blog)
  28. 🟡 DeepInfra on Hugging Face Inference Providers 🔥 (HuggingFace Blog)
  29. 🟡 QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard (HuggingFace Blog)
  30. 🟡 How Far Did They Go? The Persuasive Tactics of Covert LLM Agents in a Discontinued Field Experiment (arXiv cs.AI)
  31. 🟡 LeanMarathon: Toward Reliable AI Co-Mathematicians through Long-Horizon Lean Autoformalization (arXiv cs.AI)
  32. 🟡 Minimizing the Hidden Cost of Scales: Graph-Guided Ultra-Low-Bit Quantization for Large Language Models (arXiv cs.AI)
  33. 🟡 Ten Headache Specialists versus Artificial Intelligence for Clinical Literature Summarization: A Critical Evaluation and Comparison (arXiv cs.AI)
  34. 🟡 Brick-Composer: Using MLLMs for Assembly with Diverse Bricks (arXiv cs.AI)
  35. 🟡 Insurance of Agentic AI (arXiv cs.AI)
  36. 🟡 智源&清华合作成果登上Science：脑科学多模态基础模型Brainμ支撑揭示“记忆-睡眠”调控的神经机制 (量子位)
  37. 🟡 国星宇航与腾讯云签署“星算”计划战略合作协议，携手领航AI云服务新生态 (量子位)
  38. 🟡 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action (Google AI Blog)
  39. 🟡 The new AI-powered Google Finance is expanding to Europe. (Google AI Blog)
  40. 🟡 See what happens when creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses. (Google AI Blog)
  41. 🟡 OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models (HuggingFace Blog)
  42. 🟡 Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality (HuggingFace Blog)
  43. 🟡 Adding Benchmaxxer Repellant to the Open ASR Leaderboard (HuggingFace Blog)
  44. 🟡 How to build scalable web apps with OpenAI's Privacy Filter (HuggingFace Blog)
  45. 🟡 How to Use Transformers.js in a Chrome Extension (HuggingFace Blog)
  46. 🟡 Ecom-RLVE: Adaptive Verifiable Environments for E-Commerce Conversational Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  47. 🟡 GitHub recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third year in a row (GitHub Blog AI)
  48. 🟡 Take your local GitHub sessions anywhere (GitHub Blog AI)
  49. 🟡 Building a general-purpose accessibility agent—and what we learned in the process (GitHub Blog AI)
  50. 🟡 Improving token efficiency in GitHub Agentic Workflows (GitHub Blog AI)
  51. 🟡 Agent pull requests are everywhere. Here’s how to review them. (GitHub Blog AI)
  52. 🟡 Validating agentic behavior when “correct” isn’t deterministic (GitHub Blog AI)
  53. 🟡 Register now for OpenClaw: After Hours @ GitHub (GitHub Blog AI)
  54. 🟡 Building an emoji list generator with the GitHub Copilot CLI (GitHub Blog AI)
  55. 🟡 The Meta hack shows there’s more to AI security than Mythos (MIT Tech Review AI)
  56. 🟡 Google I/O showed how the path for AI-driven science is shifting (MIT Tech Review AI)
  57. 🟡 What Should Agents Say? Action-state Communication for Efficient Multi-Agent Systems (arXiv cs.AI)
  58. 🟡 An interpretable and trustworthy AI framework for large-scale longitudinal structure-pain association studies using data from the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI) (arXiv cs.AI)
  59. 🟡 WPS笔记正式发布：AI贯穿记录、整理与复用全过程 (量子位)
  60. 🟡 Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio. (Google AI Blog)
  61. 🟡 Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab. (Google AI Blog)
  62. 🟡 A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam (Google AI Blog)
  63. 🟡 Profiling in PyTorch (Part 1): A Beginner's Guide to torch.profiler (HuggingFace Blog)
  64. 🟡 Shipping a Trillion Parameters With a Hub Bucket: Delta Weight Sync in TRL (HuggingFace Blog)
  65. 🟡 Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right (HuggingFace Blog)
  66. 🟡 Introducing NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Long-Context Multimodal Intelligence for Documents, Audio and Video Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  67. 🟡 DeepSeek-V4: a million-token context that agents can actually use (HuggingFace Blog)
  68. 🟡 AI and the Future of Cybersecurity: Why Openness Matters (HuggingFace Blog)
  69. 🟡 Dungeons & Desktops: Building a procedurally generated roguelike with GitHub Copilot CLI (GitHub Blog AI)
  70. 🟡 GitHub Copilot CLI for Beginners: Interactive v. non-interactive mode (GitHub Blog AI)
  71. 🟡 The AI Hype Index: AI gets booed in graduation season (MIT Tech Review AI)
  72. 🟡 It’s time to address the looming crisis in entry-level work (MIT Tech Review AI)
  73. 🟡 GITCO: Gated Inference-Time Context Optimization in TSFMs (arXiv cs.AI)
  74. 🟡 Uncertainty Aware Functional Behavior Prediction and Material Fatigue Assessment for Circular Factory (arXiv cs.AI)
  75. 🟡 SentinelBench: A Benchmark for Long-Running Monitoring Agents (arXiv cs.AI)
  76. 🟡 Synthetic Contrastive Reasoning for Multi-Table QA (arXiv cs.AI)
  77. 🟡 Stability vs. Manipulability: Evaluating Robustness Under Post-Decision Interaction in LLM Judges (arXiv cs.AI)
  78. 🟡 Harnessing Generalist Agents for Contextualized Time Series (arXiv cs.AI)
  79. 🟡 Agents' Last Exam (arXiv cs.AI)
  80. 🟡 Mutation Without Variation: Convergence Dynamics in LLM-Driven Program Evolution (arXiv cs.AI)
  81. 🟡 A Motivational Architecture for Conversational AGI (arXiv cs.AI)
  82. 🟡 PSEBench: A Controllable and Verifiable Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs in Patient Safety Event Triage (arXiv cs.AI)
  83. 🟡 Step-by-Step Optimization-like Reasoning in LLMs over Expanding Search Spaces (arXiv cs.AI)
  84. 🟡 EpiEvolve: Self-Evolving Agents for Streaming Pandemic Forecasting under Regime Shifts (arXiv cs.AI)
  85. 🟡 SciVisAgentSkills: Design and Evaluation of Agent Skills for Scientific Data Analysis and Visualization (arXiv cs.AI)
  86. 🟡 SoCRATES: Towards Reliable Automated Evaluation of Proactive LLM Mediation across Domains and Socio-cognitive Variations (arXiv cs.AI)
  87. 🟡 LLM Compression with Jointly Optimizing Architectural and Quantization choices (arXiv cs.LG)
  88. 🟡 We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri. (Google AI Blog)
  89. 🟡 Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS (HuggingFace Blog)
  90. 🟡 How small businesses can leverage AI (MIT Tech Review AI)
  91. 🟡 Rethinking organizational design in the age of agentic AI (MIT Tech Review AI)
  92. 🟡 I Know What You Meme, Even If it Emerged Today: Understanding Evolving Memes through Open-World Knowledge Acquisition (arXiv cs.AI)
  93. 🟡 Residual Modeling for High-Fidelity Learned Compression of Scientific Data (arXiv cs.AI)
  94. 🟡 Assessing the Carbon Emissions and Energy Consumption of U.S. Hyperscale Data Centers (arXiv cs.AI)
  95. 🟡 Zero knowledge verification for frontier AI training is possible (arXiv cs.AI)
  96. 🟡 Output Type Before Quality: A Standards-Derived XAI Admissibility Rubric for Autonomous-Driving Safety (arXiv cs.AI)
  97. 🟡 Severity-Aware Curriculum Learning with Multi-Model Response Selection for Medical Text Generation (arXiv cs.AI)
  98. 🟡 When Should We Protect AI? A Precautionary Framework for Consciousness Uncertainty (arXiv cs.AI)
  99. 🟡 Individual Gain, Collective Loss: Metacognitive Adaptation in AI-Assisted Creativity (arXiv cs.AI)
  100. 🟢 有人靠CPU把AI算力密度卷到了新高度 (量子位)
  101. 🟢 How the Pope’s Magnifica Humanitas offers a template for individuals to meet the AI moment (MIT Tech Review AI)
  102. 🟢 A reality check on the AI jobs hysteria (MIT Tech Review AI)
